mapper.select:
select c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date, c.end_date, c.master_id, c.subject, c.create_time, c.update_time, e.name master_name from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id
c.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and (c.begin_date between #{begin} and #{end}) and (c.end_date between #{begin} and #{end})
